name: 離婚對峙場景
description: 離婚協議書成為權力博弈的道具，簽與不簽之間充滿張力。女主反覆用離婚作為籌碼，從被動接受到主動操控局面。

examples.drama_title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!
examples.excerpt: Sign here. Mrs. CEO sign what? I want you to tear up that divorce agreement... This divorce? I'm not getting a divorce... either stand on your head and wash your hair or get a divorce.
examples.context: 離婚協議書成為權力博弈的道具，簽與不簽之間充滿張力。女主反覆用離婚作為籌碼，從被動接受到主動操控局面。
